about.name: Victor Fernandes
about.subtitle: Hello, I'm
about.title: About Me
about.content:
Dynamic interface development with React, database management with PostgreSQL, and API optimization with Express.

CI/CD pipeline automation with GitHub Actions and Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform for container orchestration and infrastructure as code. Systems integration with messaging tools like Kafka, SQS, and SNS, ensuring high availability and performance. Bug resolution, continuous security improvements, team mentorship, code reviews, and collaboration with multidisciplinary teams to define product and architecture strategies.

items.title: Full Stack Developer
items.subtitle: Enso Connect · Full-time
items.content: Working as a software engineer developing new features from scratch and maintaining production systems. Focused on user experience, efficiency, and code quality, using React, Python, and AWS to achieve reliable and efficient results. Leveraged technologies like DynamoDB, Cognito, and Amplify to maintain and scale startup products.

items.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
items.subtitle: OLX Brasil
items.content: Technical leadership in distributed systems development with Node.js, Golang and Python, using React for interfaces and PostgreSQL for data management. CI/CD pipeline implementation with GitHub Actions, infrastructure automation with Terraform and Kubernetes, and asynchronous integration with Kafka, SQS and SNS. Mentorship and resolution of architectural and performance challenges.

items.title: Mid-Level Full Stack Developer
items.subtitle: Rede D'or São Luiz
items.content: Responsible for developing systems with Node.js and front-end with Angular and React. MongoDB and Redis integration for storage and caching solutions, using Docker and Express to optimize the environment. Contribution to code reviews and implementation of automated tests.

items.title: Junior Full Stack Developer
items.subtitle: OI S.A
items.content: Development of applications with Node.js and React, integrating MongoDB and Redis for data optimization. API implementation using Express and environment configuration with Docker. Participation in bug resolution and support for continuous deployment.

items.title: Technical Degree in Digital Game Programming
items.subtitle: NAVE - Núcleo Avançado em Educação
